fields.question: How many years of experience do you have supporting seller-side commercial contracts?
What best describes your contracting experience?
options: Primarily sell-side (supporting Sales teams to close deals)

fields.question: How would you describe your role in contracting work?
options: I actively drive deals from start to signature
I support deal flow and coordinate stakeholders
I mainly prepare or review documents when requested
I primarily escalate to Legal for decisions
